title: Device Home Screen - Battery life
scenario: Device Home Screen battery display shows greyed-out icons with last known percentage when headset is powered off
steps: Observe battery icon display for a headset (single device)
Observe battery icon display for a headset with a charging case
Observe battery icon display for earbuds (left, right, case)
Check battery icon color at charge level 100%-40%
Check battery icon color at charge level 39%-20%
Check battery icon color at charge level 19%-1%
Check battery icon color at 0% charge
Turn off the headset and observe battery icon display
expected:
- For headsets: single battery icon shown.
- For headsets with charging case: two icons marked "H" (headset) and "C" (case) shown.
- For earbuds: three icons marked "L" (left), "R" (right), and "C" (case) shown.
- Battery icon color: 100%-40% = black (white in dark mode), 39%-20% = yellow, 19%-1% = red, 0% = empty.
- When headset is turned off: battery icons are greyed out with last known percentage displayed.
